The '''Rilctur carbine''' was a lightweight [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]]-type weapon that exhibited a gentle recoil. It was named after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rilctur]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
